rulings.Case Title: SMART BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JANE MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Complaint And Answer Of Smart Builders, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday December 23, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN Motion To Strike Complaint And Answer Of Smart Builders, Inc. is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the request to strike answer. Notice of Motion is insufficient to provide notice of this relief. See Notice of Motion 1:19-20. Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED as stayed for 30 days for Plaintiff to obtain counsel. If no substitution of attorney is filed within 30 days of notice of entry of order, Defendant may appear ex-parte to lift the stay. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: SMART BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JANE MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended X-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday December 23, 2016, line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANT JANE MARTIN Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended X-Complaint DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1324 (a)(1) (Ex. D to Shaughnessy Declaration); (a)(2)-(3) (Motion and Memorandum of Points and Authorities); (b)(1) (Shaughnessy Declaration). =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: AGPM 2656 VAN NESS LP VS. ALMA RIVERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Mpa
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday December 23, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT ALMA RIVERA, DESERIE TORRES Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. The requirements of CCP 412.20 are met, the required information is not omitted from the summons. Summons provides "Notice to Defendant Alma Rivera, an individual; Desire Torres, an individual, and DOES 1 through 10; You are being sued by Plaintiff: AGPM 2656 Van Ness, LP." Beck v. Ransome-Crummey Co. (1919) 42 Cal. App. 674. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: AGPM 2656 VAN NESS LP VS. ALMA RIVERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Deserie Torres' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday December 23, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT DESERIE TORRES Defendant Deserie Torres' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. The requirements of CCP 412.20 are met, the required information is not omitted from the summons. Summons provides "Notice to Defendant Alma Rivera, an individual; Desire Torres, an individual, and DOES 1 through 10; You are being sued by Plaintiff: AGPM 2656 Van Ness, LP." Beck v. Ransome-Crummey Co. (1919) 42 Cal. App. 674. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
